join_order.probe: num(filtered: uom=USD, ddate IN [20230101,20231231], value IS NOT NULL)
join_order.semantic: keep num rows with NO matching pre row

filters.note: YYYYMMDD integer direct compare; zone map skips blocks where max_ddate < 20230101 OR min_ddate > 20231231

filters.implementation: load num/uom_dict.txt at runtime, find usd_code, compare int32_t

pre_anti_join_set.slot: struct PreSlot { int32_t adsh; int32_t tag; int32_t ver; int32_t valid; }  /* 16 bytes */
pre_anti_join_set.init: std::fill(pre_ht.begin(), pre_ht.end(), PreSlot{0,0,0,0})  /* C20: no memset */
pre_anti_join_set.probing: bounded linear: for(uint64_t p=0; p<cap; p++) { slot=(h+p)&mask; ... }  /* C24 */

aggregation_map.value: struct AggSlot { uint64_t key; int64_t count; double sum_value; }  /* 24 bytes */
aggregation_map.capacity_note: next_power_of_2(50000 * 2) = 2^17 = 131072  /* C9: full cardinality per thread */
aggregation_map.merge: sequential merge of 64 thread-local maps into single global map

phases.name: build_pre_hash_set
phases.description: Single-threaded scan of pre (9.6M rows): load adsh.bin, tag.bin, version.bin via mmap reinterpret_cast (P2). Insert each (adsh, tag, ver) triple into pre_ht using bounded linear probing (C24).

phases.name: scan_filter_antijoin_aggregate
phases.description: Parallel morsel-driven scan of num. For each morsel (block of 100K rows): (1) zone-map skip on ddate; (2) row-level filter: ddate IN range AND uom==usd_code AND !isnan(value); (3) probe pre_ht with (adsh,tag,ver) — keep row if NOT found; (4) update thread-local agg map with (tag_code, ver_code) key.

phases.name: merge_and_having
phases.description: Merge 64 thread-local agg maps into global map. Apply HAVING count > 10.

phases.name: topk_output
phases.description: Collect surviving groups, std::partial_sort top-100 by cnt DESC (P6). Decode tag_code via num/tag_dict.txt and ver_code via num/version_dict.txt (C18). Output CSV.

indexes.purpose: skip_blocks where ddate range [20230101,20231231] cannot intersect block
indexes.layout: [uint32_t num_blocks][{int32_t min_val, int32_t max_val, uint32_t block_size}...]

correctness_checks: C2: usd_code looked up from num/uom_dict.txt at runtime — never hardcoded
C9: pre_ht capacity = next_power_of_2(9600799*2)=33554432; agg capacity=131072 per thread (full cardinality)
C19: zone-map skip only on ddate (has index num/indexes/ddate_zone_map.bin)
C20: std::fill for PreSlot sentinel initialization, not memset
C24: bounded probing for-loop (p < cap) in both pre_ht insert and probe
C15: agg key includes BOTH tag_code AND version_code
C18: decode tag/version codes to strings for output
